examples: She was an industrious and willing worker.
Asia's development achievements today are the result of the persistent efforts of the industrious and talented Asian people.
Long before the use of machinery and fertilizers, industrious and creative farmers had already used different kinds of methods to increase crop yields.
De la Renta and his team may be the most industrious of the large fashion houses based here.
Yarnell was a good man, thrifty and industrious, and he later became a prosperous house painted in Memphis, Tennessee.
